name: Hot Bean Thread Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. SOAK THE NOODLES in a large bowl of warm water for 15 minutes.
2. When the noodles are soft, drain them and discard the water.
3. Cut the drained noodles into 3-inch lengths using kitchen scissors or knife.
4. Heat oil in a hot wok or pot. Add scallions and garlic; stir-fry quickly for a few seconds.
5. Add ground beef to the wok; cook until browned, about 5-10 minutes.
6. Stir in all sauce ingredients except sesame oil; cook over gentle heat for 5 minutes.
7. Add the drained noodles and sesame oil; cook an additional 5 minutes.
8. Serve hot noodles with sauce in individual bowls or one large serving bowl.
